title: CNBC Daily Open: All eyes on Trump address as markets rise on ceasefire hopes
summary_full: All eyes are on U.S. President Donald Trump's national address this morning, as investors hope that a resolution to the Iran war could be coming soon.
summary_public: All eyes are on U.S. President Donald Trump's national address this morning, as investors hope that a resolution to the Iran war could be coming soon.
